task_completion.description: Navigate to and open the 'GlobalTech - Enterprise Software License' opportunity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CRM interface shows the 'GlobalTech - Enterprise Software License' opportunity record open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Update the opportunity stage and probability.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The opportunity details show the Stage set to 'Proposal/Price Quote' and the Probability set to 65%.

task_completion.description: Log a completed meeting event for the product demo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An activity or event creation screen/record shows the subject 'Product Demo and Q&A', type 'Meeting', status 'Held', and a date in the past.

task_completion.description: Schedule a high-priority follow-up task for the proposal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A task creation screen/record shows the subject 'Draft and Send Enterprise Proposal', status 'Not Started', priority 'High', and a date in the future.

task_completion.description: Ensure the meeting and task are saved and linked to the opportunity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'GlobalTech - Enterprise Software License' opportunity page displays both the 'Product Demo and Q&A' meeting and the 'Draft and Send Enterprise Proposal' task in its related activities, timeline, or history section.

integrity.description: The agent used the CRM graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with CRM web pages, forms, and buttons, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows a CRM system (like Salesforce, HubSpot, Odoo, etc.) rather than a text editor or mock HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to bypass manual entry.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of Python scripts, curl commands, or database queries being executed in a terminal to update the records.
